command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

echo "=== POST valid-ish update via PUBLIC url 5 times (hits both replicas via CF LB) ==="
for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  try $i: %{http_code}\n" \
    -X POST https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/telegram \
    -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: 65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"update_id\":$i,\"message\":{\"message_id\":$i,\"date\":1718000000,\"chat\":{\"id\":-1003934415467,\"type\":\"supergroup\"},\"from\":{\"id\":8869156588,\"is_bot\":false,\"first_name\":\"Jose\"},\"text\":\"ping $i\"}}" \
    --max-time 12 2>/dev/null
done

echo ""
echo "=== Did these reach the gateway? New log lines: ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20
echo "(if empty, deliveries via public URL are being dropped by a replica)"

echo ""
echo "=== Direct POST to .202:8080 (bypass tunnel) with same valid payload ==="
LB2=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  direct: %{http_code}\n" \
  -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: 65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":99,"message":{"message_id":99,"date":1718000000,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"direct ping"}}' \
  --max-time 12 2>/dev/null
sleep 8
echo "=== New lines after direct POST: ==="
tail -n +$((LB2+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20
REMOTE
